name: Ltr Pharma Limited
analysis: LTP has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 36% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.5200, stop A$0.3614, target A$0.5900 (0.44:1) — then trail it.
